QW-404  FILLER METALS. (a) Filler metals are assigned to F-Numbers and A-Numbers in accordance with the groupings of this paragraph. (b) For procedure qualification, a change in F-Number is an essential variable as required by QW-250, subject to requalification per QW-202. (c) For performance qualification, a change in F-Number is an essential variable subject to QW-350. Filler metals shall be compatible with the base metal P-Number group of QW-403. For high alloy steel fillers, see UHA-32. See also QW-200 for WPS specifications, except as provided by QW-280 for special processes.
